---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 125, Safari 17)
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
- Screen size / device: (e.g. iPhone 15, 1440px desktop)

## Additional Context

Any other context, console errors, or logs that may help.
